description_long: This is a polygonal, disposable-style coffee cup with a faceted, cylindrical body and a slightly tapered base. The cup features a dark, matte-finished lid that fits snugly on top, likely made of plastic, and a brown, octagonal sleeve wrapped around the midsection, suggesting insulation for hot beverages. The main body of the cup is a light gray or white, resembling paper or lightweight plastic, and the sleeve appears to be made of cardboard or a similar material. The lid is solid black and has a raised, angular design, typical of to-go coffee cups found in urban cafes. There are no visible handles, branding, or decorative patterns on the exterior. The overall design is utilitarian and modern, suitable for carrying hot drinks on city streets or in office environments.
description: A faceted, disposable coffee cup with a black lid and brown sleeve, featuring a modern, utilitarian design. The cup is light gray with no visible branding or decorative elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black lid, brown sleeve, and light gray body with clear faceted edges.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated view, still highlighting the lid and sleeve, with the sleeve's angular shape more pronounced.
description_view_2: Another rotated view, showing the sleeve's even coverage and the cup's consistent faceted body.
description_view_3: Back view, similar to the front, with the sleeve and lid fully visible and no additional features.
